headline: The AI Boom Ran Into a Power Wall; This Nasdaq Company Is Building the Battery That Rolls In to Fix It
summary: Equity Insider News Commentary — The artificial intelligence buildout has collided with a physical limit that no algorithm can code its way around: electricity. Data centers are demanding power faster than the grid can add it through traditional fixed infrastructure, and that gap has become one of the defining investment themes of the decade.
